coverage_note: 6/8 vehicle_category+fuel_type combinations matched an emission factor and distance estimate. Excluded (no matching factor/distance data): two_wheeler/other_fuel, car/other_fuel — 1,552 vehicles (12% of this zone's estimated fleet) not counted toward the index. RTO allocation: this zone's vehicle count is RTO DL7's total split EVENLY across 2 zones (Anand Vihar, Vivek Vihar) — no finer-grained official data exists to split it more precisely. The excluded 'other_fuel' count (CNG-only + dual-fuel/hybrid combinations) is disproportionately Delhi's commercial fleet (autos, taxis, LCVs) — the highest km/day segment covered by this data. Dropping it likely UNDERSTATES zones with more commercial traffic, not a neutral omission — see real_registrations.py.
